---
title: "1.3 Sustainability"
description: "Natural capital, natural income, and ecological footprints."
---

::: {.callout-note title="What this topic covers"}
- Point one *(replace me)*
- Point two *(replace me)*
- Point three *(replace me)*
:::

## Key concepts

*Write the explanation here. Copy the structure from
[1.1 Perspectives](1-1-perspectives.qmd): a few short paragraphs, then a diagram.*

## Key terms

| Term | Meaning |
|------|---------|
| *term* | *definition* |

## Check yourself

::: {.callout-tip title="Quick questions" collapse="true"}
1. *Question one*
2. *Question two*
:::
